blurb: Economics consultancy with an AI practice; launch coverage uses first-party AI competition-policy analysis.

publications.title: Out of the clouds: the downstream focus for AI in 2025
publications.summary: Frontier Economics argues the competitive focus in AI is shifting downstream, from building the most capable models to deployment, distribution and regulator-facing market structure questions.
